name: User
description: Authenticated account used to access protected FreshCart management screens.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the user.

attributes.name: email
attributes.description: Unique email address used for login.

attributes.name: password
attributes.description: Password credential for authentication in the demo app.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Display name of the user.

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: Authorization role such as admin or customer.

attributes.name: createdAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

attributes.name: updatedAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the user was last updated.

relationships.description: A user can have multiple cart items.
A user can place or manage multiple orders.

name: Product
description: Fruit or vegetable item available for purchase or store management.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the product.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Product name such as Organic Bananas or Baby Spinach.

attributes.name: category
attributes.description: Product category such as Fruit or Vegetable.

attributes.name: price
attributes.description: Numeric product price.

attributes.name: unit
attributes.description: Unit of sale such as lb, bag, box, or each.

attributes.name: stock
attributes.description: Available inventory quantity.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Inventory/display status such as active or low.

attributes.name: accent
attributes.description: UI accent color used for visual product cards.

attributes.name: createdAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the product was created.

attributes.name: updatedAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated.

relationships.description: A product can appear in many users' cart items.
A product can appear in many order line items.

name: CartItem
description: Line item representing a product and quantity in a user's cart.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the cart item.

attributes.name: userId
attributes.description: Reference to the user who owns the cart item.

attributes.name: productId
attributes.description: Reference to the selected product.

attributes.name: quantity
attributes.description: Selected quantity of the product.

attributes.name: createdAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the cart item was created.

attributes.name: updatedAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the cart item was last updated.

relationships.description: Each cart item belongs to one user.
Each cart item references one product.

name: Order
description: Customer/store order containing status and payment/fulfillment total.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique internal identifier for the order.

attributes.name: orderNumber
attributes.description: Human-readable unique order number such as ORD-1042.

attributes.name: userId
attributes.description: Reference to the user associated with the order.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Order workflow status such as PENDING, PAID, PACKING, or DELIVERED.

attributes.name: total
attributes.description: Order total amount.

attributes.name: createdAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

attributes.name: updatedAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

relationships.description: Each order belongs to one user.
Each order can contain multiple order items.

name: OrderItem
description: Line item within an order that captures product, quantity, and price at purchase time.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the order item.

attributes.name: orderId
attributes.description: Reference to the parent order.

attributes.name: productId
attributes.description: Reference to the purchased product.

attributes.name: quantity
attributes.description: Purchased quantity.

attributes.name: price
attributes.description: Unit price captured for the order item.

attributes.name: createdAt
attributes.description: Timestamp when the order item was created.

relationships.description: Each order item belongs to one order.
Each order item references one product.

name: LandingPageContent
description: Static frontend-only presentation content for the public landing page. This is not expected to be persisted in the database for this request.

attributes.name: heroTitle
attributes.description: Primary landing page headline.

attributes.name: heroSubtitle
attributes.description: Supporting text that explains FreshCart Market.

attributes.name: callToActionLabel
attributes.description: Text for the primary sign-in button.

attributes.name: callToActionRoute
attributes.description: Internal route for the primary CTA, expected to be /login.

attributes.name: featureHighlights
attributes.description: Static list of landing page benefit highlights such as fresh inventory, fast checkout, and order tracking.
